title: eryngium pseudojunceum
intro: Eryngium pseudojunceum, also known as Sea Holly or Velvet Dock, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Eryngium pseudojunceum has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used as a dried flower or root infusion, often in the form of teas or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effectiveness and potential side effects.
